name: ship
description: /ship — take a feature from idea to merged in one command: worktree → discover → plan → build → review, gating only on design direction and 'go'. Auto-opening HTML design/go/review cards, gate desktop notifications, a stage-aware status line, GPT-5.5-first BUILD routing (Opus for the judgment-heavy minority), and fresh-agent verification before merge. Bundles router + verify.
